productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Navy Blue Shoes
description: For the man who is smart enough to prefer quality along with a sporty feel, this pair from red tape is the right choice. Wear this with washed jeans and your favourite T-shirt, a perfect off-duty ensemble to wear for a coffee date in the evening. Upper High quality genuine leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Central lacing system Padded tongue for comfort Branding appliqued on the midfoot and tongue Stitched detailing on the midfoot and the heel for style Padded sockliner Midsole Rubber midsole for comfort Outsole Textured TPR outsole with a raised heel shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
